offer: For logistics fleet coordinators managing 5–15 vehicles, inconsistent maintenance scheduling causes vehicle breakdowns. We automate preventive maintenance notifications instead of manual tracking of maintenance schedules via spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent maintenance scheduling leading to vehicle breakdowns.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics fleet coordinators
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics fleet coordinators with demo video
Share insights in community forums for logistics tools
try_it: Let users try logging maintenance activities and tracking dashboard
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing maintenance data
One-click export of vehicle status report
